headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Organon (OGN) After Its Recent Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Organon at around US$11.26 is priced for a comeback or still carrying too much risk, the starting point is understanding what the current share price actually reflects. The stock has moved sharply in the short term, with returns of 21.6% over 7 days, 92.8% over 30 days and 55.5% year to date, even though the 1 year and 3 year returns of negative 10.6% and negative 47.2% tell a very different story.
